name: two-pass reconciler appends a conflict classification to the conflict-surfacing decisions log for human resolution
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p4","matched_rule_id":"r-existing","classification":"conflict"}\n' > decision.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/apply-classification.sh" --decision decision.json --decisions-log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"classification":"conflict"' pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && grep -q '"pattern_id":"p4"' pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
